sentiment.reasoning: Appointing a new division head is a standard operational change with minimal immediate market impact.

sentiment.reasoning: A 10% margin improvement indicates successful cost management or pricing power, positively impacting profitability.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
